nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: New Zealand falcon
nodes.summary: New Zealand falcon（New Zealand falcon，学名 Falco novaeseelandiae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于新西兰。

nodes.name: 新西兰
nodes.summary: 新西兰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括白眶几维、澳洲潜鸭、太平洋黑鴨等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The New Zealand falcon is only found in New Zealand. The native habitat of the eastern falcons in the eastern and central South Island is open country and steppes, with nests on steep slopes or rock ledges. In native podocarp broadleaf forests of the North Island the bush falcon hunts at forest edges and nests in pre-existing tree structures such as epiphytes and tree cavities of mature trees, or on a sheltered ground area.Seaton R., Minot E
